scores.correctness_notes: Correctly covers type, description, containers linkage, and resource name matching requirement
scores.hallucination_notes: Adds deployment details (juju deploy --resource, charmcraft upload-resource) not in gold standard, but these are factually accurate Juju/Charmcraft commands, not fabricated APIs. Minor: gold standard mentions 'file' type and 'filename' field which are omitted but absence isn't hallucination.
